title: buena lambertiana
intro: Buena lambertiana, also known as Lambert's eupatorium or Lambert's boneset, is a plant species in the Eupatorium genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Buena lambertiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Buena lambertiana, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be steeped in hot water to create a medicinal drink.
